name_en: 【Haiyuan OEM Exclusive】Top-grain cowhide, dynamic code-changing hardware chip, top-tier original order【Low Key Hobo】M25343 Green, M25341 Black, M25342 Brown. Crafted with soft cowhide to outline simple elegant lines, paired with suede lining to release a trendy vibe, showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship. An adjustable shoulder strap adorned with the classic engraved lock, with ample space to easily store daily essentials like laptops.
